description_long: This object consists of two rugged, rectangular storage boxes stacked together, both exhibiting a weathered, military-style appearance. The upper box is green with visible scuffs, scratches, and stenciled markings, while the lower box is darker, almost black, and similarly worn. Both boxes feature robust metal corner reinforcements and prominent, rectangular metal handles on their sides for easy carrying. The surfaces are matte and show signs of heavy use, with some faded text and numbers visible, suggesting prior labeling or identification. The boxes appear to be constructed from metal, likely steel, with reinforced edges and latches for secure closure. These storage boxes are suitable for use in garages, warehouses, or outdoor urban environments where durability and security are important.
description: Two stacked, weathered metal storage boxes with reinforced corners, side handles, and faded stenciled markings, showing heavy use and a rugged, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the green box stacked atop a black box, both with visible side handles and worn surfaces.
description_view_1: Side view reveals both boxes side by side, with stenciled numbers and two small cylindrical objects in front.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the back sides of the boxes, with handles and some additional wear visible.
description_view_3: Angled view displays the tops and sides of both boxes, emphasizing their reinforced corners and faded markings.
